title: Maisie Gets Her Man
writer: Elizabeth Reinhardt, Mary C. McCall Jr., Ethel Hill
actors: Ann Sothern, Red Skelton, Leo Gorcey
plot: Vaudeville performer Maisie Ravier seeks new job, meets aspiring comedian Hap Hixby, joins his act despite his romantic entanglement with Elsie McIntyre. Challenges arise from Hap's abilities, business venture, and love triangle.
